candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line, not a reported asset total.
Balancing line for noncurrent assets, not ACT.
Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash only, narrower than cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the year
candidates.why: Cash flow statement line; balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the year
candidates.why: Beginning balance from cash flow statement, not preferred for balance-sheet CHE.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate difference in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX movement, not a cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Due to municipalities regarding cash handling
candidates.why: Liability/payable, not cash.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only one component of current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Balancing line for noncurrent liabilities, not LCT.
Clean short-term borrowing line and does not mention leases; best fit for non-lease STD.
Likely includes lease current portion because its value matches Bank loan short term plus Capitalized Leases - Current Portion, so it would overstate baseline STD.
Current lease liability; explicitly excluded from baseline STD.
Too broad and not clearly financing debt.

variables.notes: Excluded lease-related current debt per baseline rule. 'Short-term interest-bearing liabilities' appears to aggregate bank loan short term and 'Capitalized Leases - Current Portion', so using only the clean non-lease component avoids double counting and lease inclusion.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Could be payroll withholding or similar operating tax payable, but less clearly the standard current tax liabilities line than 'Tax liabilities'.

variables.notes: Chose outside shortlist; confident because it is the clearest balance-sheet line for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet proxy for total/net property, plant and equipment under IFRS.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Gross right-of-use asset component, not total PPE and lease-related.
Intangibles, not PPE.
Cash flow investing line, not the balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow line, not PPE stock.
Cash flow line, not PPE stock.
Exact match for total assets.
Direct operating cash flow subtotal; best match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from current operations before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chose outside shortlist; confident because this is the cash flow statement's operating activities total.
